'''Noro Zak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Baxthrax]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Capable of flight, Jedi Zak was a noted tracker.

==Biography==
Brought into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] after being discovered to be a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] during infancy, Noro Zak entered into the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] to begin his [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] and being selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]], Zak traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] with his teacher on missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. After passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Zak was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|elevated]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and began accepting solo missions. Unlike most Jedi, Zak carried a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] on his belt, complementing his atypical style of dress: a shirt with a simple vest that did not restrict his large wings.<ref name="SFTLJ" />

During his service to the Order, Councilor [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] went missing during an [[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi|assignment]] on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. Under the leadership of Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], Zak joined [[Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and fellow Knight [[Vel Ardox]] in the search for the High Councilor. While investigating a company called [[Trinkatta Starships]], the Jedi team was ambushed by [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] stationed there. During the commotion, Master Jinn slipped away to locate Gallia while Zak aided in defeating the droids. As they fought, Master Jinn managed to find Gallia (beyond the factory and its adjoining spaceport, in an upper level of the Observation Tower) and shut down the [[Droid control program|droid control center]], disabling the Jedi's opponents. Jinn soon picked up his fellow Jedi in a [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]] and assigned Ardox and Zak the task of taking Gallia to the [[Jedi chapter house (Rhinnal)|Jedi medical academy]] on [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]].<ref name="SFTLJ" />

Leaving the Master/Padawan team on Esseles, Ardox and Zak flew to Rhinnal with Gallia and were greeted by the [[Jedi healer/Legends|healers]] there. During their stay at the medical academy, communications were knocked out by a storm, causing the Jedi on Esseles to believe Rhinnal was under attack. Rushing to their aid at Rhinnal, Jinn and Kenobi found all to be well, with Gallia healing quickly. While on the planet, Jinn informed Ardox and Zak that a group of [[Bartokk]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] had stolen several [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class]] [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]], modified by Trinkatta, to attack the [[Corulag Academy|Academy]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].

With Gallia completely healed, the group agreed to meet [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] on Corulag.<ref name="TFoDM">''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]]''</ref> Their mission was to rescue the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] infant [[Teela Panjarra]] from the Chief Scientist of the Academy's Science Services, [[Frexton]]. Like the scientist [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], who had held Jinn a [[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment|decade earlier]], Frexton hoped to unlock the secrets of the Force with the child. While their initial rescue mission was foiled by the Bartokk assassins, Grand Master Yoda found Panjarra and defeated the Bartokk. With Panjarra safe, the Jedi returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="JE">''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]''</ref>
